title: Groundnut Elite Germplasm ICGV 86388
abstract: ICGV 86388 was selected using the bulk pedigree method from a three-way cross made in 1981 between Dh 3-20, U S A 20 (ICG 983), and NC Ac 2232. Its pedigree is [(Dh 3-20 x USA 20) x NC Ac 2232] F2 - B1 - B1 - B2 - B1 . Dh 3-20 is a high - yielding Spanish bunch breeding line developed in India , USA 20 a high - yielding Virginia runner germplasm line , and NC Ac 2232 a low -yielding Virginia runner germplasm line with resistance to thrips and jassids.
